name: Texas Top 10% Automatic Admission + TEXAS Grant
sponsor: University of Texas System / Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board
amount: TEXAS Grant: up to tuition and fees at eligible TX public universities; varies by institution

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen, permanent resident, or eligible non-citizen; TX resident
eligibility.other_requirements: Automatic admission: graduate in top 10% of Texas public high school class (top 6% for UT Austin). TEXAS Grant: financial need; Pell-eligible or similar income thresholds; enroll full-time at eligible TX public university

stackable_notes: Automatic admission is independent of financial aid. TEXAS Grant stacks with federal and state aid but may reduce institutional grants at some schools.
notes: Two distinct programs: (1) Top 10% auto-admit rule (top 6% for UT Austin). (2) TEXAS Grant is need-based state aid for Pell-eligible students at public TX universities. Advising both separately is critical — they serve different purposes.
